home.title: Cihat Tombak
home.heroDesc: Expert-led training programs that bridge global best practices with local business dynamics.
home.heroDesc2: Practical tools your leaders can apply from day one.
home.whyGlobalDesc: Frameworks from Harvard, McKinsey, and CCL adapted for your organizational context.
home.whyPracticalDesc: Not lectures—interactive workshops with case studies, role-plays, and action planning.
home.whyCustomDesc: Modular programs with plug-in topics tailored to your team's specific challenges.

about.title: About
about.headline: Engineering Leader Turned Leadership Coach
about.bio: With over 15 years of experience leading software development teams at global multinational companies, I bring a practical, systems-thinking approach to leadership development.
about.philosophyText: I believe the best leadership development happens at the intersection of proven global frameworks and local organizational realities. Every program I deliver bridges this gap—equipping leaders with tools they can use immediately, not just theory they'll forget by Monday.
about.experienceText: With a career spanning global multinational engineering organizations, I've led teams through rapid growth, organizational transformation, and the challenges of distributed work. This first-hand experience informs every workshop, case study, and framework I teach.
